hero.title: Präzise messen für Ihre Branche. Jeden Verlust erkennen. Sicher entscheiden.
hero.subtitle: SectorCalc hilft bei Kosten, Effizienz, Verlusten und Optimierung — ohne teure ERP-Systeme.
hero.trustStrip: 27 Branchen · Gratis-Rechner · Premium-Berichte · Kein ERP nötig

valueProps.title: Vier Verlustdimensionen — eine Plattform
valueProps.subtitle: SectorCalc zeigt Geld-, Material-, Zeit- und Energieverluste mit Gratis-Checks und Premium-Urteilen.
valueProps.financialDesc: Marge-, Kosten- und Gewinnlecks vor dem Angebot.
valueProps.materialDesc: Ausschuss, Abfall und Ertragslücken, die Standardrechner ignorieren.

sectors.title: Wählen Sie aus {count} aktiven Branchen
sectors.subtitle: Neun Branchenkategorien — von CNC bis Landwirtschaft, Energie und Alltag.

pricing.title: Wählen Sie, wie Sie Ihre Marge schützen.
pricing.tagline: Premium-Analysatoren verwandeln Risikosignale in Mindestpreise und exportierbare Berichte.
pricing.roiCopy: Ein vermiedenes Fehlangebot kann ein ganzes Pro-Jahr finanzieren.
pricing.freeDescription: Tägliche Gratis-Checks mit sichtbaren Risikosignalen — kein Urteil oder PDF.
pricing.singleDescription: Ein Premium-Lauf mit vollem Urteil — ideal für eine kritische Entscheidung.
pricing.proDescription: Unbegrenzte Premium-Analysatoren in allen Branchen mit gespeicherten Berichten.

checkout.proActive: SectorCalc Pro ist auf Ihrem Konto aktiv.
checkout.overlayBody: Bitte warten — Stripe öffnet Ihre Zahlungsseite.

purchaseSuccess.proUpsellBody: 27 Branchen, unbegrenzte Premium-Analysatoren und gespeicherte Berichte — Pro ab $19/Monat.

footer.trustNote: Kein ERP nötig. Geschäftsdaten werden nicht verkauft.

hero.trustStrip: {count} sectors · Free calculators · Premium reports · Expert logic · No ERP required

pain.title: Detect the hidden losses in your industry
pain.subtitle: Every sector has unique losses — scrap, time, energy, material. See them instantly with sector-specific calculation tools.

material.title: Material cost risk
material.text: Setup time, rework and hidden labor erode margin after the estimate looks fine.

labor.title: Labor & time risk
labor.text: Free checks expose visible risk — premium analyzers deliver the full verdict.

overhead.title: Overhead & scope risk
overhead.text: No ERP rollout, no consulting retainer — built for shops, trades and service teams.

freeCheck.title: Run a free sector check
freeCheck.subtitle: {count} sector quick checks with 3–5 inputs. See visible risk in your browser — no account, no safe price, no final verdict.
freeCheck.cardBody: Visible setup and labor exposure — full safe price withheld on free tier.

premiumStep.title: Unlock the full verdict
premiumStep.subtitle: Premium analyzers add minimum safe price, margin leak drivers, suggested action and PDF export — the decision layer operators need before quoting.
premiumStep.cardBody: Margin leak breakdown, accept / reprice verdict and exportable PDF report.

sample.title: CNC Quote Risk Report
sample.subtitle: This is what a premium decision output looks like — not a spreadsheet dump.
sample.actionValue: Reprice or reduce scope before sending the quote.

compare.title: Quick check vs full verdict
compare.freeItem1: Visible risk signal in your browser
compare.proItem3: Accept / Reprice / Do Not Accept verdict

erp.title: No ERP required
erp.text: Free checks run without enterprise setup or onboarding.

freeSetup.title: Free checks run without setup
freeSetup.text: {count} sector quick checks in your browser — no account needed.

premiumVerdicts.title: Premium verdicts explain the risk
premiumVerdicts.text: Minimum safe price, margin leaks and suggested action before you quote.

stripe.title: Checkout secured by Stripe
stripe.text: Pro subscription billed securely through Stripe.

privacy.title: Business data is not sold
privacy.text: See privacy policy for data handling details.

cta.title: Start calculating for your sector
cta.subtitle: Begin with free tools, upgrade to premium reports when you need them.

industriesPreview.title: Sector packs for operational and commercial decisions
industriesPreview.subtitle: Each industry module combines a quick estimate layer and a premium decision tool — aligned to how that sector prices work, measures margin and evaluates risk.

reports.title: No saved reports yet
reports.body: Run a free sector check, then unlock a Single Verdict or SectorCalc Pro to save reports.
reports.bodyWithCredits: Run your unlocked premium analyzer and save the verdict report here.

purchases.title: Single verdict credits
purchases.body: One-time purchases unlock the premium analyzer for that sector tool.

login.title: Sign in to view saved reports
login.body: Saved verdict reports are linked to your SectorCalc account.
